subcodes.title: The Two Kinds of Light: Words spoken on 1911-11-05 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Today the weather is gloomy and dull! In the East there is continual sunshine, the stars are never veiled
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسیار بسیار خوش آمدید امروز هوا تاریک است
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @spiritual transformation, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
